name: Tropical Paradise
description: Enjoy sunny beaches and amazing culture in Bali.

name: Alpine Adventure
description: Experience breathtaking mountain views and skiing.

name: City Lights
description: Explore the energetic city life and iconic landmarks.

name: Safari Expedition
description: Witness incredible wildlife up close on safari rides.

name: Ancient Ruins
description: Hike the Inca trail and discover lost civilizations.

name: Beach Escape
description: Relax in overwater bungalows surrounded by turquoise waters.

name: Cultural Journey
description: Explore temples, gardens, and traditional tea ceremonies.

name: Desert Oasis
description: Experience luxury shopping and desert safaris.

name: Rainforest Retreat
description: Explore biodiversity in the heart of the jungle.

name: Historic Europe
description: Visit ancient ruins, museums, and famous piazzas.

name: Island Hopping
description: Sail around beautiful islands with crystal-clear waters.

name: Northern Lights
description: See the aurora borealis and explore volcanic landscapes.

name: Wine Country
description: Tour vineyards and enjoy exquisite wine tasting experiences.

name: Tundra Trek
description: Dog sled through snow-covered forests and visit Santa Claus Village.

name: Great Barrier Reef
description: Snorkel and dive among the world largest coral reef system.
